title: Kunlun Jie : Jiao Ren Lei
overview: "Kunlun Ruins" tells the story that Zhang Wenfeng, a descendant of the Faqiu lineage, had to embark on a vicious tomb journey with his partners Jia Luban and Zhong Ling in order to find the truth about his father's disappearance during the Republic of China
